column3: of the proportion of that fact's significant (non-stopword) words found in the generated email
column4: matched on word boundaries. 1.0 means every fact's content words are fully present; partially-covered facts get partial credit instead of all-or-nothing.

column1: # tone_score: Degree to which the generated email matches the requested tone
column2: rated 0-1 by an LLM judge (response is parsed for the first number and clamped to [0
column3: 1]). Falls back to keyword matching only if the judge call fails or returns no parseable number.

column2: capped at 1.0: non-empty subject (0.3) + body length between 20-300 words (0.3) + a recognized greeting e.g. Dear/Hello/Hi (0.2) + a recognized closing e.g. Regards/Sincerely/Best/Thank you (0.2).

column3: ["Interview was on Monday", "Position: Backend Engineer", "Want to know next steps"]
column5: Dear Sir/Madam, thank you for the interview on Monday. I appreciated the opportunity to discuss the Backend Engineer position and would like to learn about the next steps in the process.
column6: Follow-Up on Backend Engineer Interview – Monday
column7:
Dear [Hiring Manager Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on my interview for the Backend Engineer position, which took place this past Monday. I greatly appreciated the opportunity to discuss my qualifications and learn more about the team and the role.

I would like to kindly inquire about the next steps in the selection process. Please let me know if there are any additional materials or information I can provide to assist in your decision.

Thank you again for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Current deadline is Friday", "Need extra 3 days", "Reason: unexpected server issue"]
column5: Hello, I am writing to request a brief extension on the current project deadline. The deadline is Friday, but due to an unexpected server issue, we need an additional three days to complete the work.
column7:
Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to respectfully request a three-day extension for the current project deadline, which is set for this Friday. Unfortunately, our team encountered an unexpected server issue that has caused a delay in our progress. We are actively working to resolve this and believe that the additional time will allow us to deliver a high-quality result without compromising standards.

Thank you for your understanding and support. Please let me know if you require any further details.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Launch date is July 1st", "New feature: real-time collaboration", "Early access available for beta users"]
column5: Hi Team, I am thrilled to announce our product launch on July 1st. The new real-time collaboration feature will be available, and beta users can access early access starting next week.
column6: Exciting News: Real-Time Collaboration Launches July 1st!
column7:
Dear Team,

We are thrilled to announce the launch of our latest feature: real-time collaboration! Mark your calendars for July 1st, when this game-changing capability goes live. With real-time collaboration, you and your team can work together seamlessly, editing and sharing updates in the moment.

As a valued beta user, you get exclusive early access starting today. Dive in and experience the future of teamwork firsthand.

Get ready to collaborate like never before. We can't wait to see what you create!

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Outage lasted 2 hours", "Affected all users", "Root cause: database migration failure"]
column5: Dear customer, we sincerely apologize for the two-hour service outage that affected all users. The issue was caused by a database migration failure, and we are taking immediate steps to prevent this from happening again.
column7:
Dear valued users,

We sincerely apologize for the service outage that occurred recently. This interruption lasted for 2 hours and affected all users, which we understand caused significant inconvenience. The root cause was a database migration failure, and we are taking immediate steps to prevent such issues in the future.

We deeply regret the impact this had on your work and appreciate your understanding. Our team is committed to providing a reliable service, and we are implementing additional checks to ensure stability.

Thank you for your patience.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Sync every Monday at 10 AM", "Agenda: roadmap, blockers, updates", "Please bring status reports"]
column5: Hello team, please join our weekly sync every Monday at 10 AM. We will cover the roadmap, blockers, and updates. Bring your status reports so we can keep everything aligned.
column6: Invitation to Weekly Sync – Mondays at 10 AM
column7:
Hi Team,

I hope you're having a great week so far! I'd like to invite you to our weekly sync, which will take place every Monday at 10 AM. During these meetings, we'll cover our roadmap, discuss any blockers, and share important updates. To make the most of our time, please bring your status reports along.

Looking forward to seeing you there and keeping our momentum going!

Best,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Presentation scheduled for next Wednesday", "Location: Conference Room B", "Bring updated slide deck"]
column5: Dear Client, I am writing to confirm the presentation scheduled for next Wednesday in Conference Room B. Please bring the updated slide deck so we can review the latest details together.

column7:
Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to confirm our client presentation scheduled for next Wednesday. The meeting will take place in Conference Room B. Please ensure you bring the updated slide deck for the presentation.

Should you have any questions or require further details, please do not hesitate to reach out.

column3: ["Milestone completed ahead of time", "Quality checks passed", "Team thanks stakeholders"]
column5: Hi everyone, I am pleased to share that we completed the milestone ahead of schedule and passed all quality checks. Thank you to the team and stakeholders for your support.
column6: Thank You for Your Support – Milestone Completed Ahead of Schedule
column7:
Dear Team and Valued Stakeholders,

I am thrilled to share that we have successfully completed a major project milestone ahead of our planned timeline. This achievement was made possible by everyone's dedication and collaboration.

I am especially pleased to report that all quality checks have passed with flying colors, reflecting the high standards we uphold as a team.

On behalf of the entire team, I want to extend our heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support and guidance throughout this journey. Your trust and encouragement have been instrumental in reaching this milestone.

Thank you once again for being such an integral part of our success.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Proposal submitted yesterday", "Needs review by end of week", "Open to suggestions"]
column5: Hello, I submitted the proposal yesterday and would appreciate your review by the end of the week. I am open to any suggestions you may have.
column7:
Dear [Recipient's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to follow up on the proposal I submitted yesterday. Given the need for a review by the end of this week, I would greatly appreciate your feedback at your earliest convenience.

Please know that I am open to any suggestions or revisions you may have to strengthen the proposal. Your insights are highly valued, and I look forward to your thoughts.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Training on June 28", "Topics: security best practices", "Attendance mandatory"]
column5: Attention all staff: training is scheduled for June 28 on security best practices. Attendance is mandatory, so please mark your calendars.
column6: Mandatory Staff Training on Security Best Practices – June 28
column7:
Dear Team,

I am writing to inform you that a mandatory staff training session on security best practices will be held on June 28. This session is designed to enhance our collective understanding of key security protocols and ensure we maintain a safe working environment. Attendance is required for all team members. Please mark your calendars and plan accordingly. Further details regarding the schedule and logistics will be shared shortly.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

column3: ["Critical vulnerability found", "Immediate patch required", "Security team already notified"]
column5: This is urgent: a critical vulnerability has been found and requires an immediate patch. The security team has already been notified and is taking action.
column6: Urgent: Critical Security Vulnerability Requires Immediate Action
column7:
Dear Team,

A critical vulnerability has been identified in our system that poses an immediate security risk. We need to deploy a patch as soon as possible to mitigate this issue. The security team has already been notified and is prioritizing this matter. Please treat this as an urgent priority and take the necessary steps to apply the patch without delay.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
